## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential partnership between Lilt and GrowthX Labs for AI-powered content marketing services.](https://fathom.video/share/61z4MKuohEEGJYmzsbkge64MssEYsWs3?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Lilt is looking to scale marketing efforts without adding headcount, focusing on AI-augmented content production](https://fathom.video/share/61z4MKuohEEGJYmzsbkge64MssEYsWs3?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs offers an AI + expert-driven content marketing service, producing \~25 articles/month for $9k/mo](https://fathom.video/share/61z4MKuohEEGJYmzsbkge64MssEYsWs3?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)
  - [Lilt's current marketing is mostly outbound; organic efforts are in early stages with new website launch coming](https://fathom.video/share/61z4MKuohEEGJYmzsbkge64MssEYsWs3?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Next steps: GrowthX to send proposal, add Rik to Slack, and potentially start in May pending budget approval](https://fathom.video/share/61z4MKuohEEGJYmzsbkge64MssEYsWs3?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)

## Topics

### Lilt's Current Marketing Situation

  - [Recently hired Rik as CMO in February to build out marketing function](https://fathom.video/share/61z4MKuohEEGJYmzsbkge64MssEYsWs3?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [Primarily relying on outbound sales efforts currently](https://fathom.video/share/61z4MKuohEEGJYmzsbkge64MssEYsWs3?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Launching new website in 2 weeks to boost inbound/organic efforts](https://fathom.video/share/61z4MKuohEEGJYmzsbkge64MssEYsWs3?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Looking to scale content production (whitepapers, case studies, SEO blogs) without large team or agency costs](https://fathom.video/share/61z4MKuohEEGJYmzsbkge64MssEYsWs3?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
  - [Current domain authority is low (\~36), presenting opportunity for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/61z4MKuohEEGJYmzsbkge64MssEYsWs3?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

### GrowthX Labs' Offering

  - [AI-powered content engine combined with expert oversight](https://fathom.video/share/61z4MKuohEEGJYmzsbkge64MssEYsWs3?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
  - [Produces \~25 articles (50,000 words) per month for $9k monthly fee](https://fathom.video/share/61z4MKuohEEGJYmzsbkge64MssEYsWs3?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [12-week initial program to kickstart content production](https://fathom.video/share/61z4MKuohEEGJYmzsbkge64MssEYsWs3?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Includes strategy development, content calibration, and weekly check-ins](https://fathom.video/share/61z4MKuohEEGJYmzsbkge64MssEYsWs3?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [Optional link-building services to boost domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/61z4MKuohEEGJYmzsbkge64MssEYsWs3?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
  - [Aims to start publishing by week 3-4, ramping up volume over time](https://fathom.video/share/61z4MKuohEEGJYmzsbkge64MssEYsWs3?tab=summary&timestamp=671.0)

### Implementation Process

  - [Starts with 1-hour kickoff call and deep research into Lilt's business](https://fathom.video/share/61z4MKuohEEGJYmzsbkge64MssEYsWs3?tab=summary&timestamp=779.0)
  - [Weekly 30-minute check-ins to review progress and align on strategy](https://fathom.video/share/61z4MKuohEEGJYmzsbkge64MssEYsWs3?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [GrowthX team handles content production, SEO, and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/61z4MKuohEEGJYmzsbkge64MssEYsWs3?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [Lilt team provides initial context and ongoing feedback as needed](https://fathom.video/share/61z4MKuohEEGJYmzsbkge64MssEYsWs3?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### Potential Benefits for Lilt

  - [Rapidly scale high-quality content production without hiring writers](https://fathom.video/share/61z4MKuohEEGJYmzsbkge64MssEYsWs3?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
  - [Boost organic traffic and domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/61z4MKuohEEGJYmzsbkge64MssEYsWs3?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)
  - [Augment current outbound efforts with strong inbound marketing](https://fathom.video/share/61z4MKuohEEGJYmzsbkge64MssEYsWs3?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Leverage AI to manage what traditionally required large teams](https://fathom.video/share/61z4MKuohEEGJYmzsbkge64MssEYsWs3?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send detailed proposal and add Rik to shared Slack channel](https://fathom.video/share/61z4MKuohEEGJYmzsbkge64MssEYsWs3?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)
  - [Rik to review proposal with Spence (CEO) and consider budget implications](https://fathom.video/share/61z4MKuohEEGJYmzsbkge64MssEYsWs3?tab=summary&timestamp=1682.0)
  - [Potential kickoff in May, pending approval and budget discussions](https://fathom.video/share/61z4MKuohEEGJYmzsbkge64MssEYsWs3?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)
  - [Rik to attend GrowthX CMO event on April 23rd for further networking](https://fathom.video/share/61z4MKuohEEGJYmzsbkge64MssEYsWs3?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)
  - [Follow-up discussion next week after Lilt's office move](https://fathom.video/share/61z4MKuohEEGJYmzsbkge64MssEYsWs3?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
